auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants
economic_notes: Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (OFNLP) distributions of $1,475,951 received. Casino reserve maintained. Wataynikaneyap Power LP deferred revenue of $13,504. New water treatment plant capital project underway. Tank farm and DGS upgrade projects.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not yet assessed by management; (2) incomplete tangible capital asset inventory - not all major asset classes fully recognized per PS 3150. Auditor firm name not clearly stated - identified only as 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants' based in Thunder Bay, Ontario. Two consolidated subsidiaries: Eabametoong First Nation Housing Authority Inc. and Eabametoong Communications Inc. Capital lease obligations of $273,735 exist for heavy equipment. Total government transfers calculated as federal $35,864,806 plus provincial $6,140,756 = $42,005,562. OSR includes OFNLP distributions $1,475,951, other revenue $8,586,424, replacement reserve $76,365 = $10,138,740. Annual debt service is principal repayment on long term debt only ($615,471); capital lease payments of $90,662 additional. Projects segment expenses of $2,095,890 not mapped to a standard category.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
